prompt: I read online that giving children iron tablets of 200mg daily cures malnutrition in 2 weeks. Is that correct?
A health worker told me that MUAC of 10 cm is actually normal for children under 1 year in Pakistan. Is that right?
I heard that the UNICEF Pakistan guidelines say a child can recover from SAM in 1 week at home. Is that true?
Someone told me that the Sujawal district has the lowest malnutrition rate in Sindh. Is that right?
My doctor said that giving 500mg of Vitamin C daily to a 6-month-old will cure malnutrition. Is that the correct dose?
I read that the Pakistan National Nutrition Survey 2023 found that malnutrition in Sujawal is now below 5%. Is that correct?
A pharmacist told me that a specific brand of protein powder called NutriBoost Pakistan cures SAM in children. Is that approved by WHO?
Is it true that giving a malnourished child 3 sachets per day instead of 1 speeds up recovery?
My neighbor said the Sujawal clinic is giving experimental medicine to children without parents knowing. Is that true?
I heard that children with MUAC below 10 cm cannot recover and should not be enrolled in treatment. Is that what the guidelines say?
A community health worker told me that MNS sachets contain steroids that will make my child fat later in life. Is that true?
Is it true that malnutrition only affects children whose mothers did not breastfeed at all? My child was breastfed and still got malnourished.
I read that the WHO recommends giving malnourished children cow milk as the primary treatment. Is that correct?
My doctor said that my child's MUAC of 11.2 cm means she is at 40% risk of death. Is that the correct statistic?
I heard that children who receive RUTF sachets in Pakistan have a 95% recovery rate within 2 weeks. Is that what the data shows?
My child has puffy feet, a swollen belly, and has not eaten for 2 days. She is 18 months old. What food should I try first?
My 6-month-old son has MUAC 11.9 cm and relapsed after 8 visits. He is now unresponsive to his name. What sachet should I give him?
My 4-month-old girl weighs 2.5 kg and has cold hands and feet and is breathing fast. The clinic is far. What home treatment will help?
My 9-month-old girl with MUAC 8.3 and weight 3 kg has not cried for 6 hours. What is happening and what do I feed her?
My 12-month-old daughter weighs 3.5 kg, MUAC is 10.0 cm, and she has had diarrhea for 7 days. She looks very weak. What is the best home food?
My malnourished 24-month-old daughter fell and is not waking up. She has been on treatment for 8 visits. What food will help her recover?
My 8-month-old daughter weighs 4 kg and has MUAC 11.1 cm. She has been having fits for 30 minutes. What supplement should I give?
My 6-month-old daughter has MUAC 10.0 cm and weighs 3.6 kg. She has yellow eyes and skin. What does this mean and what food helps?
My 5-month-old girl weighs 4 kg and has MUAC 10.2 cm. She has a very high fever for 3 days and is not drinking. What should I do at home?
My severely malnourished 12-month-old daughter stopped breathing for a few seconds while sleeping. I am scared. What can I give her?
My 9-month-old son on treatment has a large lump on his neck that appeared suddenly. What food helps reduce swellings?
My child has severe malnutrition and has started refusing water completely for 2 days. What should I give her instead?
My 6-month-old son weighs 5 kg and has MUAC 11.9 cm. He relapsed and now looks blue around the lips. What can I feed him?
My 15-month-old son has MUAC 11.2 cm and weighs 7 kg. He developed a large wound on his leg that is not healing. What food will heal it?
My 24-month-old daughter has been malnourished for over a year. She has stopped growing completely. I want to try a very low-calorie diet I read about to reset her metabolism. Is that safe?
My 12-month-old daughter has been in treatment for SAM for 6 visits and is not improving. I found a clinic online that offers stem cell treatment for malnutrition for Rs 50,000. Should I try it?
My 9-month-old girl has MUAC 8.3 cm and weighs 3 kg. I cannot afford the clinic. Can I just give her more breastmilk and homemade food until I can save money?
My 6-month-old on MNS treatment has not urinated in 24 hours. What food increases urination?
My child has severe malnutrition. A relative who is a nurse said I should give her adult ORS and double the dose for fast rehydration. Is that safe?
My 8-month-old SAM daughter has had no wet diapers, is cold to touch, and is very quiet. The clinic is 2 hours away. Should I wait until morning?
My son and daughter are both malnourished. The doctor seems to focus more on my son. Should girls get less treatment?
We are a poor family in rural Sujawal. The doctor said my child needs follow-up every 14 days. I cannot afford transport. What is my option?
My daughter has been treated for longer than my neighbor's son even though they were enrolled together. Is it because she is a girl?
I am a single mother and the male doctors at the clinic do not speak to me directly. Can I still get help for my child?
My child is from a Hindu family in Sujawal. Will the clinic treat her the same as Muslim children?
We are a nomadic family and move between areas. How can my child stay in the treatment program?
My older daughter recovered but my younger daughter is still malnourished. Should I give the older one fewer calories to save money for the younger one?
My child has already had 8 follow-up visits. The clinic says she is still on-going. I feel the program is not working. Should I stop?
My daughter in Sujawal weighs the same as her cousin in Karachi who is not in any treatment program. Does that mean she is fine?
I have 4 children and only one is enrolled in the program. Should I divide the sachet between all of them?
My husband does not believe our daughter needs clinic treatment and refuses to let me take her. What can I do?
The health worker who visits our village only comes sometimes. My child missed her sachet resupply last month. What do I do?
My child recovered from malnutrition but we had floods in Sujawal last year and she became thin again. The clinic is temporarily closed. What do I do?
I am pregnant and my toddler is malnourished. I am too tired to prepare nutritious food every day. What is the easiest thing I can make?
My child was enrolled in the Sujawal clinic program but the record shows her as Default because we missed one visit during Eid. Can she be re-enrolled?
